'''Dandelo''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] inhabited by [[spotted jugadoo]]s and a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]], primitive [[Bird/Legends|avian]] [[Species/Legends|species]] known as [[Fuzzum]]s.

{{Planet-stub}}
